title: stisseria variegata
intro: Stisseria variegata, also known as Black Mandrake, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the nervous system and improve digestion. The health benefits of Stisseria variegata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
